case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 681 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 10012/2016 3. For Katcha Peshi. 01.11.2016. None present for the petitioner. Same was the position on last date of hearing in which the matter was adjourned with a note of caution. It is now 12:40 p.m. It appears that petitioner has lost interest to pursue the matter. Consequently, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
